testcase.name: SEC_001 Arm Stay
testcase.failure:
Step: Wait for Status: Armed Stay
Action: Timeout reached. Desired status 'Armed Stay' not achieved.
Page: main
Message: Timeout reached. Desired status 'Armed Stay' not achieved.
testcase.system-out:
================================================== Step: Check whether the Arm Status is Disarmed
Result: Passed
Duration: 3434.4604 ms
Message: Status check passed. Expected and actual status: Disarmed
================================================== Step: Check whether the Exit delay Status is Ready to Arm
Result: Passed
Duration: 2536.5244 ms
Message: Exit delay status check passed. Expected and actual status: Ready to Arm
================================================== Step: Switch Audio
Result: Passed
Duration: 2940.3857000000003 ms
Message: SwitchAudio action completed. Desired state: On
================================================== Step: Switch Entry Delay
Result: Passed
Duration: 2967.4757 ms
Message: SwitchEntryDelay action completed. Desired state: On
================================================== Step: Click Arm Stay
Result: Passed
Duration: 27064.5702 ms
Message: Arm stay action completed successfully.
================================================== Step: Wait for Status: Armed Stay
Result: Failed
Duration: 62868.8353 ms
Message: Timeout reached. Desired status 'Armed Stay' not achieved.
